Global: Scale Add bonus to calc_vehicle_health in terms of percent of base health. Only the first five ranks are used here -- or as many hover drive ranks as we have -- as all hover drives of the same rank scale health evenly. No manufacturer favors health bonuses.
Global: Post Add bonus to regen rate, as a multiplier relative to max health.
Global: Post Add bonus to regen delay in seconds.
Speed: Post Add bonus to normal forward speed in miles per hour.
Speed: Post Add bonus to boosting forward speed in miles per hour.
Speed: Post Add bonus to strafing speed, in miles per hour.
Speed: Post Add bonus to speed when driving in reverse, in miles per hour.
Accel: Post Add bonus to boosting acceleration in cm/s^2.
Handling: Post Add bonus to braking power while boosting, in cm/s^2.
Handling: Post Add bonus to braking power in cm/s^2.
Handling: Post Add bonus to braking power while boosting, in cm/s^2.

Accel: Post Add bonus to the index that selects among acceleration curves in PV_Base. These curves are a scalar on total acceleration power versus current speed relative to maximum. Non-integer values are valid and will blend between the nearest curves.
Accel: Post Add bonus to the index that selects among boosting acceleration curves in PV_Base.
Boost: Post Add bonus to air control, as a percent in the range [0,1].
Boost: Post Add bonus to braking while airborne, as a percent in the range [0,1].
Boost: Scale Add bonus to the cost of fuel consumption while boosting.
Handling: Post Add bonus to the index that selects among incline angle curves in PV_Base. These curves as a scalar on total acceleration power relative to the current incline angle in degrees.
Handling: Post Add bonus to the index that selects among incline angle curves, while boosting.
Handling: Post Add bonus to the index that selects among spring systems. Springs govern the vehicle's tendency to face in the direction of the camera as well as it uprighting when overturned.
Boost: Post Add bonus to the sliding time required to reach each boost level. Tentatively applied 2x and 3x for consecutive levels.
Boost: Post Add bonus to the outgoing boost time. Tentatively applied 2x and 3x for consecutive levels.
